value.reason: The page clearly documents the Claude Desktop App's Code tab as a shipped feature, confirming parallel sessions, integrated terminal and file editor, embedded browser preview, cloud/SSH remote execution, and dispatching sessions from a phone (via the Cowork/Dispatch tab). The label "Claude Desktop App (Code Tab)" is accurate and supported by the page. However, the description contains one factual error: it states the app runs "as a terminal CLI on Linux," but the page explicitly states "The desktop app is not available on Linux; use the CLI instead." Linux users get the CLI as a separate fallback, not as an alternative surface of the Desktop App. Everything else in the description is faithful to the page.
